HELP.FORGOT_PASSWORD: Enter the email address associated with your account. We will send you instructions to reset your password.
HELP.SIGN_UP: Provide a valid email and create a password to register for an account. You will receive a verification email to confirm your email address.
HELP.RESET_PASSWORD: You can now set a new password for your account. Please choose a strong password that you have not used before.

ALERTS.PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS: Password reset successfully. Use the new password to sign in.

EMAIL_VALIDATION.SENT: A validation email has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
